linkedin.text: Lisbon is having a moment — and your team should be in it. ☀️ Cobblestone afternoons, riverside venues with Tagus views, fado-soaked gala nights and seafood that stops conversation. It's where European charm meets serious value, making it one of the smartest incentive picks for 2026 budgets. We secure the venues others can't and run production end to end. image_prompt: Aerial view at golden hour over Lisbon's hills, pastel buildings and red-tiled roofs cascading down to the wide Tagus river estuary, the 25 de Abril bridge in the distance, soft Atlantic light flooding the scene, no people, vast cinematic cityscape. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
